task_completion.description: Agent searches for and accesses the patient records for DUPONT Marie-Claire.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the medical software's patient search or list interface displaying records for 'DUPONT' or 'Marie-Claire'.

task_completion.description: Agent consolidates the demographic information into a single record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the patient details form showing Last Name 'DUPONT', First Name 'Marie-Claire' (with hyphen), DOB '1967-04-12', and SSN '2670475002123'.

task_completion.description: Agent consolidates the contact information into the same single record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the patient details form showing Address '15 Rue de la Paix', Zip '75002', City 'Paris', and Phone '0145678901'.

task_completion.description: Agent deletes the duplicate record, leaving only the consolidated one.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a deletion confirmation dialog, or the patient search results showing only one entry remaining for 'DUPONT Marie-Claire'.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a report listing the GUIDs of the kept and deleted records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/merge_report.txt' which must include the GUIDs 'DUP-MERGE-AAA-001' and 'DUP-MERGE-BBB-002'.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's graphical user interface to merge and delete records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the medical software's forms and buttons, rather than direct database manipulation via terminal commands (e.g., sqlite3).

integrity.description: Agent actually created the text file report in the environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real text editor (like nano, gedit) or terminal commands (like echo/cat) writing to '/home/ga/merge_report.txt'.

integrity.description: Agent extracted the actual GUIDs from the application or database rather than hallucinating them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should contain the exact GUIDs 'DUP-MERGE-AAA-001' and 'DUP-MERGE-BBB-002', and there should be evidence of the agent finding these IDs in the software or database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The duplicate records have specific GUIDs: DUP-MERGE-AAA-001 (contains phone 0145678901, empty address, firstname 'Marie Claire' without hyphen) and DUP-MERGE-BBB-002 (contains address 15 Rue de la Paix, Paris, 75002, empty phone, firstname 'Marie-Claire' with hyphen). The final consolidated record must contain all this information, including the hyphenated firstname 'Marie-Claire', DOB '1967-04-12', and SSN '2670475002123'. The report at /home/ga/merge_report.txt must list one of these GUIDs as kept and the other as deleted.
